params.ingredients: Array of sauce bytecode (last = main, rest = functions)

params.amount0Delta: The amount of token0 owed (positive) or received (negative)
params.amount1Delta: The amount of token1 owed (positive) or received (negative)
params.data: Arbitrary data passed through by the caller

params.params: Quote parameters including stateView for V4

returns.result: Quote result with amountOut, priceAfter, etc.

quoteInfinityBin(address,(address,addres.details: sqrtPriceAfter is reported as 0 (Bin pools have no sqrt-price concept)

swapInfinityBin(address,(address,address.details: amountSpecified must be NEGATIVE (exact input). Returns (-amountIn, +amountOut).

swapInfinityCL(address,(address,address,.details: amountSpecified must be NEGATIVE (exact input). Returns (-amountIn, +amountOut).

params.amount0Delta: The amount of token0 owed (positive) or received (negative)
params.amount1Delta: The amount of token1 owed (positive) or received (negative)
params.data: Arbitrary data passed through by the caller

returns.result: Any data to return to the caller of unlock()

quoteInfinityCL(address,(address,address.notice: Quote an exact-input PancakeSwap Infinity CL swap (simulate-and-revert; token-free)

swap((uint8,address,(address,address,uin.notice: Execute a swap on any supported pool type (V2, V3, V4)

swapInfinityBin(address,(address,address.notice: Execute an exact-input swap on a PancakeSwap Infinity Bin pool via the Vault lock

swapInfinityCL(address,(address,address,.notice: Execute an exact-input swap on a PancakeSwap Infinity CL pool via the Vault lock

swapV4(address,(address,address,uint24,i.notice: Execute a swap directly on a V4 pool (legacy interface)

uniswapV3SwapCallback(int256,int256,byte.notice: Called by Uniswap V3 pools during swap execution

unlockCallback(bytes).notice: Called by the pool manager on msg.sender when unlock is called
